creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri Feb  7 12:59:53 2014
New Revision: 343224
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/343224
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r343224/

Log:
  - Update to 0.45
  -
  
  PR:		186417
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/devel/rudiments/Makefile
  head/devel/rudiments/distinfo
  head/devel/rudiments/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/rudiments/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/rudiments/Makefile	Fri Feb  7 12:59:02 2014	(r343223)
+++ head/devel/rudiments/Makefile	Fri Feb  7 12:59:53 2014	(r343224)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rudiments
-PORTVERSION=	0.44.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.45
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -11,17 +11,6 @@ COMMENT=	C++ class library for daemons, 
 
 LICENSE=	LGPL20
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS PCRE SSL
-OPTIONS_DEFAULT=SSL
-
-PCRE_LIB_DEPENDS=	libpcre.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pcre
-PCRE_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	pcre
-
-SSL_USE=	OPENSSL=yes
-SSL_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	ssl
-SSL_CONFIGURE_ON=	--with-ssl-includes=-I${OPENSSLINC} \
-			--with-ssl-libs=-L${OPENSSLLIB}
-
 USES=		pkgconfig shebangfix
 SHEBANG_FILES=	doc/programming/insert.pl
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool
@@ -29,6 +18,16 @@ USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
 PLIST_SUB=	VERSION="${PORTVERSION}"
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=		DOCS PCRE SSL
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	SSL
+
+PCRE_LIB_DEPENDS=	libpcre.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pcre
+PCRE_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	pcre
+SSL_USE=		OPENSSL=yes
+SSL_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	ssl
+SSL_CONFIGURE_ON=	--with-ssl-includes=-I${OPENSSLINC} \
+			--with-ssl-libs=-L${OPENSSLLIB}
+
 post-patch:
 	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -name "Makefile*" | ${XARGS} ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		'/pkgconfig/s| $$(libdir)/| $${DESTDIR}$$(prefix)/libdata/| ; \
